name: @openfantasymap/lcars-core
description: Core LCARS (Star Trek Library Computer Access/Retrieval System) component library: themeable Stylus/CSS + a dependency-free data-binding runtime. Framework wrappers: @openfantasymap/lcars-react, @openfantasymap/lcars-ngx.

scripts.build:css: stylus --include-css --compress --out dist src/index.styl && mv dist/index.css dist/lcars.css
scripts.build:css:expanded: stylus --out dist src/index.styl && mv dist/index.css dist/lcars.expanded.css
scripts.build: npm run build:css && npm run build:css:expanded
